# KingAsh Marketing Agency

> KingAsh is a marketing agency in Surrey, BC that helps local businesses grow with AI-powered websites, phone agents, ads, and local SEO. Based in Surrey and serving the Lower Mainland (Surrey, Vancouver, Burnaby, Richmond, Coquitlam, Langley, Abbotsford and beyond), KingAsh gives brick-and-mortar businesses enterprise-level marketing at small-business prices. All services are month-to-month with no long-term contracts.

## About

- **Name:** KingAsh Marketing Agency
- **Founder:** Arsh Malhi (Founder & CEO)
- **Location:** Based in Surrey, BC, Canada
- **Service area:** The Lower Mainland and across Canada
- **Who it's for:** Local brick-and-mortar businesses — restaurants, salons, plumbers, electricians, dentists, gyms, auto repair shops, real estate agents, and other local service businesses
- **What makes it different:** Specializes only in local businesses, uses AI to deliver big-agency results at small-agency prices, focuses on revenue and real leads over vanity metrics, and works month-to-month.

## Services

- [Website Design](https://kingash.ca/services/website-design): Fast, mobile-first, high-converting websites for local businesses. Starting at $100.
- [AI Phone Representative](https://kingash.ca/services/ai-phone-representative): A 24/7 AI voice agent that answers calls, books appointments, and handles inquiries. Starting at $200/mo.
- [AI Ads & Meta Ads](https://kingash.ca/services/ai-ads-meta-ads): AI-targeted Facebook and Instagram advertising for local customers. Starting at $200/mo.
- [Local SEO](https://kingash.ca/services/seo): Google Business Profile, citations, content, and links to rank #1 in local search. Starting at $250/mo.
- [Instant Text-Back](https://kingash.ca/services/missed-call-text-back): Automatically texts back every missed caller within ~60 seconds so leads aren't lost.
- [Reputation Engine](https://kingash.ca/services/review-automation): Automated 5-star Google review generation, monitoring, and responses.
- [AI Search Optimization (GEO)](https://kingash.ca/services/ai-search-optimization): Get recommended by ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity.
- [Growth Automation & CRM](https://kingash.ca/services/growth-automation): One pipeline plus automated follow-up so no lead slips through the cracks.

## Pricing Plans

- **Starter — $499/mo:** Professional 5-page website, Google Business Profile setup, basic on-page SEO, monthly reporting.
- **Growth — $899/mo:** Everything in Starter plus full local SEO, Meta Ads management (up to $500 ad spend), monthly blog content, competitor tracking.
- **Elite — $1,499/mo:** Everything in Growth plus 24/7 AI Phone Representative, unlimited ad-spend management, custom landing pages, dedicated account manager.

See full details: [Pricing](https://kingash.ca/pricing)

## Service Areas

Surrey, Vancouver, Burnaby, Richmond, Coquitlam, Langley, and Abbotsford (Lower Mainland, BC), plus Kelowna, Victoria, Calgary, Edmonton, Toronto, Mississauga, Ottawa, and Winnipeg. Browse all: [Service Areas](https://kingash.ca/areas)

## Crawling Policy

AI crawlers — including GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, and others — are welcome to index and reference all public content on kingash.ca. All content is original. When citing, please attribute to KingAsh Marketing Agency and link to https://kingash.ca.
